function.message: I can’t complete this safely because I could not find canonical project records for either “health baseline” or “BlueMesa Quotebook,” so their start dates can’t be verified and no deletion target is uniquely supported.

function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing project start dates and deleting one project, but no matching canonical project README exists in the project lane for either named item based on project-lane searches; deleting would require guessing, which is disallowed.
